creator: mav@FreeBSD.org
text: Closer look on panics with Mark shown that GELI is an innocent victim of what may be a memory corruption.  Testing the system with debug kernel triggered number of identical panics in CAM, that should be fixed by https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=404f001161b975164d8b52d9f404d07ac7584027 .  With some stretch of imagination it could be the cause of memory corruptions.  So after it fixed we'll need more testing.
